config.neo4j.topic.cypher.ctsserver.CTS_DataCen: call apoc.do.case([ event.op = 'c','MERGE (c:CTSMemberAI {CustID: event.after.FromCustID}) MERGE (c2:CTSMemberAI {CustID:event.after.ToCustID}) MERGE (c)-[r:USE_AI]->(c2) ON CREATE SET r.CreatedDate = event.after.CreatedDate RETURN r' ,event.op = 'u','MATCH (CTSMemberAI {CustID: event.before.FromCustID})-[oldR:USE_AI]->(:CTSMemberAI {CustID: event.before.ToCustID}) DELETE oldR WITH event MERGE (c:CTSMemberAI {CustID: event.after.FromCustID}) MERGE (c2:CTSMemberAI {CustID: event.after.ToCustID}) MERGE (c)-[r:USE_AI]->(c2) ON CREATE SET r.CreatedDate = event.after.CreatedDate RETURN r' ,event.op = 'd','MATCH (:CTSMemberAI {CustID: event.before.FromCustID})-[oldR:USE_AI]->(:CTSMemberAI {CustID: event.before.ToCustID}) DELETE oldR'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value
